description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, horizontal layout. The exterior features a combination of white and gray materials, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The house includes a prominent driveway leading to a two-car garage, with one red and one blue vehicle visible, and a separate parking area with a white car. A backyard area contains a uniquely shaped pool, surrounded by a patio. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The main entryway is centrally located, accessible via a paved path, and is flanked by large windows and a sheltered overhang.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a two-car garage, and a backyard pool. The exterior is white and gray with clean, minimalist lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two-car garage with red and blue vehicles, and a paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, white car in a separate parking area, and the elongated structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a uniquely shaped pool and patio area, as well as large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the overall horizontal spread of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a flat overhang, large glass panels, and a paved approach
